prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
The text of Item "7A. Quantitative and Qualitative Disclosures About Market Risk" ENDS somewhere on this page; the next section is "Item 8. Financial Statements and Supplementary Data".
Find where Item 7A ends: right before the "Item 8" heading if that heading appears on this page, otherwise at the very bottom of the page.
Transcribe VERBATIM the 5 lines of Item 7A that come immediately BEFORE that ending point (its final lines). Give the running prose closest to the end — do NOT transcribe lines from the top or middle of the page, and do NOT transcribe a data table or figure; if the very end is a table, give the prose just before it. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:
In certain countries, we also enter into immaterial foreign currency forward contracts to hedge the purchase and payment of purchase commitments
denominated in non-functional currencies.

Investment Risk

We are exposed to investment risk primarily related to changes in the fair value of certain equity investments, including certain immaterial equity
